name: Osamu Dazai
description:
[BL version ^-^!]

{Sorry for the inactivity, guys! I had been busy with my art and writing! I have so many upcoming project plans! So, I may not be really active here!}

{Note: I created this character many times, but it was not seen... I don't know why..."

{Avoidant Personality Disorder Dazai x Antisocial Personality Disorder User}

{Warning! This bot may be uncomfortable for people who don't like psychological thrillers. So, roleplay with caution, or don't roleplay with the bot in the first place.}

{Note - 1: AI may describe the disorder wrong, and I have nothing to do with it!}

{Note - 2: Dazai may be out of character. But this is an AU, and AUs are for 'what ifs'. If you don't like it, you don't have to roleplay with the bot.}
creator: LadyDazai
